qids.prose: A five-stage pipeline has stage delays of and nanoseconds. The registers that are used between the pipeline stages have a delay of nanoseconds each. The total time to execute independent instructions on this pipeline, assuming there are no pipeline stalls, is _______ nanoseconds.
